title: Think Again
author: Adam Grant
subline: The power of knowing what you don't know.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A thought loop: an idea box on the left, an arrow looping to itself, with the text 'BELIEVE' crossed out and 'THINK AGAIN' written. The word 'AGAIN' is in RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- A circular thought loop drawn as an arrow that wraps itself -->
    <g fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <path d="M 0 -300 A 300 300 0 1 1 -260 150"/>
      <polyline points="-260 150 -240 110 -290 130"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The inner box: an idea being held -->
    <g transform="translate(0 0)">
      <rect x="-180" y="-60" width="360" height="120" fill="#0a0a0a" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="-12" font-size="32" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em" text-decoration="line-through">BELIEVE</text>
      <text x="0" y="34" font-size="32" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.06em">THINK AGAIN</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A small 'reconsider' sub-label below -->
    <text x="0" y="380" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">THE LOOP · ITERATION N+1</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A thought loop: BELIEVE crossed out, THINK AGAIN written in RED below. The loop wraps back to itself — the book's process. 360px weight-500 title centered.
